## What this PR does

One or two sentences on the change.

## Why

What problem it solves. Link the issue with `Closes #N` if there is one.

## How it was tested

- [ ] `npm run build` runs clean
- [ ] Sideloaded the `dist/` folder and opened a YouTube video
- [ ] Sideloaded the `dist/` folder and opened a Netflix video (if the change touches Netflix)
- [ ] Popup still opens and all controls still react
- [ ] Service worker logs look reasonable (no red errors)

## Screenshots or clips

If the change is visual. Drag and drop in.

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything you want flagged before review — deliberate trade-offs, things you were unsure about, follow-up work you filed as a separate issue, etc.
